name: Eusu Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Eusu Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, provides shipping and logistics services worldwide. The company's services include air and marine shipping, overland and railroad transport, customs, project goods transport, warehouse storage, logistics consulting, etc., as well as customized services, including FMS, WMS, and TMS services. It also provides IT services for the maritime logistics industry; and produces coffee beans. The company was founded in 1949 is based in Seoul, South Korea.
